title: Biome Bonanza!
description: Adds many unique Vanilla+ biomes to spice up your world.
body:
This mod is still in alpha.

 

**Biome Bonanza** aims to expand your world by adding many **new and unique biomes** to your world in a **Vanilla+** style!

**This mod adds no new blocks or mobs, all biomes are constructed using Vanilla blocks!**

 

**Current Content:


1. Amethyst Purple Forest

2. Autumn Woods

3. Rocky Fields**

 

_More Content Coming Soon!_
